description: Authoring source for specialist-by-lane role capabilities; adapters and the cross-lane index are derived.

coverage_policy.primary: full: required capabilities must resolve in the primary execution plan
coverage_policy.non_primary: partial: backup, escalation, review, and throughput lanes are best-effort and must state limitations
